title: stelis vulcani
intro: Stelis vulcani, also known as the Vulcan's helmet, is a species of orchid found in the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis vulcani include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis vulcani typically involve decoctions or infusions of the plant's roots and leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used in topical applications for wound healing and skin conditions.
